sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ الْمُسْلِمُونَ بِعِيدِ الْفِطْرِ بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani slave Ramazanski bajram nakon završetka mjeseca Ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the end of the month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الْأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَشْعُرُونَ بِسَعَادَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca nose novu odjeću i osjećaju veliku sreću.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and feel great happiness.

sentences.translation: Porodice razmjenjuju posjete, čestitke i poklone.
sentences.translationEn: Families exchange visits, greetings, and gifts.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَأْكُلُونَ حَلْوِيَّاتٍ خَاصَّةً مِثْلَ الْمَعْمُولِ.
sentences.translation: Također jedu posebne kolače poput ma'moula.
sentences.translationEn: They also eat special sweets like Ma'amoul.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْعِيدُ وَقْتٌ لِلْفَرَحِ وَالسَّلَامِ وَمُسَاعَدَةِ الْفُقَرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj praznik je vrijeme za radost, mir i pomaganje siromašnima.
sentences.translationEn: This holiday is a time for joy, peace, and helping the poor.
